current_html:
§ 1400.220 What contracts and subcontracts, in addition to those listed in 2 CFR 180.220, are covered transactions?

Although the OMB guidance at 2 CFR 180.220(c) allows a Federal agency to do so (also see optional lower tier coverage in the figure in the appendix to 2 CFR part 180), the Department of the Interior does not extend coverage of nonprocurement suspension and debarment requirements beyond first-tier procurement contracts under a covered nonprocurement transaction.
proposed_html:
1400.220
What contracts and subcontracts, in addition to those listed in 2 CFR 180.220, are covered transactions?

Although the OMB regulation at 2 CFR 180.220(c) allows a Federal agency to do so (also see optional lower tier coverage in the figure in appendix A to 2 CFR part 180), the Department of the Interior does not extend coverage of nonprocurement suspension and debarment requirements beyond first-tier procurement contracts under a covered nonprocurement transaction.
